_comment: QA baseline experiment for Qwen3.7 Plus on DashScope OpenAI-compatible mode. Set OPENAI_BASE_URL=https://dashscope.aliyuncs.com/compatible-mode/v1, OPENAI_API_KEY, and LLM_API_MODE=chat_completions.
